name: Metallic Fluted Wall Panels
description: Upgrade your interiors with Metallic Fluted Wall Panels from Goals Floors. Designed for modern Indian homes and commercial spaces, these premium metallic finish panels give a luxurious look without the high cost of real metal. Available in Silver, Gold, and Copper finishes, these panels are 100% waterproof, termite-proof, and easy to clean. These panels are widely used for TV unit walls, living room feature walls, office reception designs, and bedroom backdrops. Whether you are renovating your home or setting up a new office in Delhi NCR, our metallic fluted panels provide a seamless, long-lasting design with zero maintenance.

longDescription:
Metallic Fluted Wall Panels are the latest trend in interior design across India. If you want a rich, luxury look for your home or office without spending a fortune, these panels are the perfect choice. With a 12-inch wide profile, these panels reduce joints and create a seamless modern wall finish compared to traditional narrow panels. With a starting price of ₹650 per panel, they offer an affordable yet premium upgrade over standard paint or wallpaper. They are widely used to highlight TV unit backgrounds, living room walls, and office reception areas.

Made from high-quality PVC and WPC materials, these panels are 100% waterproof and termite-proof, making them highly durable for Indian weather conditions, including damp walls. The interlocking system allows for quick, dust-free installation, saving you time and labor costs. Available in beautiful Silver, Gold, and Copper finishes, Goals Floors delivers these high-quality panels directly across Delhi, Noida, Gurgaon, and the rest of India.
priceDetails: The price of Metallic Fluted Wall Panels is ₹650 per panel. This includes the premium metallic finish and highly durable waterproof material.
comparison: Compared to real metal sheets or premium wallpapers, metallic fluted panels are much cheaper, 100% waterproof, and do not rust or peel off over time.
installation: Installation is very simple and fast. The panels are fitted using a tongue-and-groove locking system along with strong adhesive. It can be installed directly over existing walls in just a few hours without any messy cement work.

benefits.title: Luxury Look at Low Cost
benefits.description: Get the expensive look of real metal for your walls at a fraction of the price.

benefits.title: 100% Waterproof
benefits.description: Perfect for damp walls and humid areas. These panels will not swell or spoil due to moisture.

benefits.title: Zero Maintenance
benefits.description: No need for repainting or polishing. Just wipe with a clean cloth to keep the shine looking new.

faqs.question: What is the price of Metallic Fluted Wall Panels in India?
faqs.answer: The price of our premium Metallic Fluted Wall Panels is ₹650 per panel.

faqs.question: Are these panels safe from termites and water?
faqs.answer: Yes, they are 100% waterproof and termite-proof. They are perfect for Indian homes, especially if you have damp walls.

faqs.question: Where can I use these metallic panels?
faqs.answer: These panels are most popular for TV unit backgrounds, living room walls, bedroom highlights, and office reception areas.

faqs.question: Do I need to break my wall to install them?
faqs.answer: No, there is no need to break or damage your walls. They are easily pasted directly over your existing wall using strong adhesive.

faqs.question: Are metallic fluted panels better than PVC wall panels?
faqs.answer: Metallic fluted panels offer a more premium and modern look compared to standard PVC panels, especially for feature walls and TV units.
